3053230.name: IL-2 Sturmovik: Havoc Over the Kuban Campaign
3053230.description:
This historically inspired single-player campaign is set during mid to late 1942 on the Caucasus Front. The German 17th army and several mountain divisions pushed to the Caucasus mountains, culminating in a drive toward Tuapse - their ultimate goal was the Soviet oil fields at Maikop, Baku and Azerbaijan. This offensive was largely abandoned in November of 1942 due to Hitler's need to marshal forces around Stalingrad. After the defeat at Stalingrad the remaining German forces were ordered to withdraw toward the Taman peninsula to the northwest.

This campaign focuses on a fictitious, but historically plausible A-20 Boston, or "Havoc" squadron flying interdiction missions against the over-extended German supply lines. The leader of your unit knows the region well, every peak and valley, and takes full advantage of his knowledge of the terrain as he takes you under his wing and leads the squadron over the snow-capped mountains and the Black Sea to thwart the German advance.

Time frame: September 3rd, 1942 - October 27th, 1942
Available Aircraft: A-20B
Duration: 16 missions
Average total playtime: 12 hours
3053230.supported_languages:
英语, 俄语*, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
*具有完全音频支持的语言
